comments:
MediaState - audio/video playback state atoms.

Models the complete playback lifecycle for Frame.io-level
video interfaces. Includes buffering, seeking, and error states.

declarations.comments: Create playback rate (clamps to valid range)
declarations.title: playbackRate

declarations.comments:
Create time position (clamps to [0, 604800] seconds)

Maximum is 7 days (604800 seconds) — practical upper limit for any media.
declarations.title: timePosition

declarations.comments: Media duration in seconds (Maybe because unknown until loaded)
declarations.title: Duration

declarations.comments:
Bounds for PlaybackRate [0.25, 4.0]

- 0.25x: Quarter speed (slowest practical slow-motion)
- 4.0x: Quadruple speed (fastest practical fast-forward)
declarations.title: playbackRateBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for VolumeLevel [0.0, 1.0]

- 0.0: Muted (silent)
- 1.0: Full volume
declarations.title: volumeLevelBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for TimePosition [0.0, 3600.0] seconds

- 0.0: Start of media
- 3600.0: 1 hour max (reasonable for most media)
declarations.title: timePositionBounds

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Reactive.MediaState
